note: Shared research-compound catalogue for all SmashFat-family peptide sites. Prices in CAD per vial. purity is the release threshold. Descriptions are research-framed. 'new' and stock ('in'|'low') are display flags.

products.d: A novel metabolic research compound under active investigation for lipid and energy regulation.
A novel metabolic research compound under investigation for energy regulation and cellular vitality.
A triple GIP/GLP-1/glucagon receptor agonist under investigation for metabolic and weight-management research.
A mitochondrial-derived research compound encoded in the 12S rRNA gene with metabolic and cytoprotective properties.
Body Protection Compound-157. A 15-amino-acid partial sequence of human gastric juice protein.
Copper research compound tripeptide-1. A naturally occurring plasma tripeptide with copper-binding properties.
Thymosin Beta-4. A 43-amino-acid research compound involved in actin sequestration and tissue repair.
A selective growth-hormone secretagogue and ghrelin receptor agonist.
A synthetic analogue of the endogenous tetrapeptide tuftsin with anxiolytic properties.
An ACTH(4-7) analogue with nootropic and neuroprotective properties.
A stabilized GHRH analogue with potent growth-hormone-releasing activity for metabolic and body-composition research.
A mitochondria-targeted tetrapeptide with potent antioxidant and cardioprotective properties.
Nicotinamide adenine dinucleotide — a critical coenzyme in cellular energy metabolism and DNA repair.
A synergistic blend of BPC-157 and TB-500 for advanced tissue-repair and recovery research.
A synthetic tetrapeptide analogue of epithalamin studied for telomere elongation, anti-aging, and circadian-rhythm regulation.
A C-terminal tripeptide of α-MSH with potent anti-inflammatory and gut-protective properties.
A synthetic analogue of α-MSH acting as a non-selective melanocortin receptor agonist, studied for pigmentation and energy-regulation research.
USP-grade bacteriostatic water for reconstituting lyophilized research compounds.
